original_UMa_vs_field.note: Replicated original result with quality cuts

trgb_tier1_group_vs_field.note: REVERSED: groups show MORE scatter (mass confound - groups are dwarf-rich)

trgb_tier2_with_UMa.note: Still reversed even with UMa included

hubble_flow_upgraded_vs_original.note: 5 galaxies with TRGB distances show 27% less scatter than full HF sample

interpretation.distance_quality_accounts_for: ~35% of original Δσ signal (from confounder analysis)
interpretation.mass_confound: Group environments in TRGB subsample are dwarf-rich, inflating group scatter
interpretation.environmental_signal: Cannot be confirmed or refuted with current TRGB/Cepheid sample
interpretation.key_limitation: Only 1/28 UMa galaxies has Cepheid distance; comparison requires cluster TF distances
interpretation.recommendation: Use BIG-SPARC (~4000 galaxies) with CF4 distances for definitive environmental test
